output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?player ?birthYear WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P1545 wd:Q2519752 .
  ?season rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , '2004–05 Primeira Liga'))
  ?player p:P729 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P729 ?season .
  ?statement pq:P530 ?goals .
  FILTER(?goals = 18)
  ?player wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  BIND(YEAR(?birthDate) AS ?birthYear)
}
